textByHash.3b31f9c1b2aa0318fec99a5fb2de2df41b740ec5: Err, there are some mines just outside the western gatehouse. I don't know what the rocks contain there though, you'll have to have a look.
textByHash.b9ccd653ce1f4976b57cad18ae7fef3f7a15f2f3: Is there anything I can help you with?
textByHash.17c15eca4b7835196e9f6018e58d1bbbf1b72e25: Oh, another one of the King's paranoid schemes. He's like a parasite sucking the life out of the town. Alright, how much does he want?
textByHash.c28db2f97012ad9aa499062501c8cea3107edb7b: What? Can't you count? I'm not paying my tax to someone who can't count.
textByHash.4917df870e90a085be7165094da965196eceb2fc: That's not right. I'm not paying you that much!
textByHash.752e7a079bce784be178a5412edba1384da25063: [sigh] It seems a lot of money for some windows.
textByHash.5c5484b2edbbfddfb24d2b659ef528bf60ab9d31: Please no. I have a wife and seven kids to support.
textByHash.4c9c87e30aa26b0282b31022c81f9ef1f773e814: Oh, hello again. Want some fish?
